testcase.name: test_crawl_completes

failure.message: AssertionError: final status=None phases_seen=set() assert None == 'completed'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_crawl_coverage_iter3.py:211: in test_crawl_completes assert status == "completed", f"final status={status} phases_seen={phases_seen}" E AssertionError: final status=None phases_seen=set() E assert None == 'completed'
